enterprises.title: Get announcement banner for enterprise

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

enterprises.descriptionHTML: Gets the announcement banner currently set for the enterprise.

schema.title: Announcement Banner
schema.description: Announcement at either the repository, organization, or enterprise level

announcement.description: The announcement text in GitHub Flavored Markdown. For more information about GitHub Flavored Markdown, see "[Basic writing and formatting syntax](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-cloud@latest//github/writing-on-github/getting-started-with-writing-and-formatting-on-github/basic-writing-and-formatting-syntax)."

expires_at.description: The time at which the announcement expires. This is a timestamp in [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format: `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`. To set an announcement that never expires, omit this parameter, set it to `null`, or set it to an empty string.

user_dismissible.description: Whether an announcement can be dismissed by the user.

enterprises.title: Set announcement banner for enterprise

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

bodyParameters.name: announcement
bodyParameters.description: The announcement text in GitHub Flavored Markdown. For more information about GitHub Flavored Markdown, see "Basic writing and formatting syntax."

bodyParameters.name: expires_at
bodyParameters.description: The time at which the announcement expires. This is a timestamp in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ. To set an announcement that never expires, omit this parameter, set it to null, or set it to an empty string.

bodyParameters.name: user_dismissible
bodyParameters.description: Whether an announcement can be dismissed by the user.

enterprises.descriptionHTML: Sets the announcement banner to display for the enterprise.

schema.title: Announcement Banner
schema.description: Announcement at either the repository, organization, or enterprise level

announcement.description: The announcement text in GitHub Flavored Markdown. For more information about GitHub Flavored Markdown, see "[Basic writing and formatting syntax](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-cloud@latest//github/writing-on-github/getting-started-with-writing-and-formatting-on-github/basic-writing-and-formatting-syntax)."

expires_at.description: The time at which the announcement expires. This is a timestamp in [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format: `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`. To set an announcement that never expires, omit this parameter, set it to `null`, or set it to an empty string.

user_dismissible.description: Whether an announcement can be dismissed by the user.

enterprises.title: Remove announcement banner from enterprise

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

enterprises.descriptionHTML: Removes the announcement banner currently set for the enterprise.

organizations.title: Get announcement banner for organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

organizations.descriptionHTML: Gets the announcement banner currently set for the organization. Only returns the announcement banner set at the organization level. Organization members may also see an enterprise-level announcement banner. To get an announcement banner displayed at the enterprise level, use the enterprise-level endpoint.
